Entries.Name: Lanman Workstation Guest Auth Policy
Entries.Description: Enable the LanmanWorkstation guest-auth Group Policy setting
Entries.Detail: Enables a Group Policy setting that allows the LanmanWorkstation service to accept guest-authenticated SMB connections. Required for certain share access scenarios.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Enables a Group Policy setting that allows the LanmanWorkstation service to accept guest-authenticated SMB connections. Required for certain share access scenarios. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: Performance Tuning
Entries.Detail: Runs a set of legacy system optimizations and boot configuration adjustments to improve general system responsiveness.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Runs a set of legacy system optimizations and boot configuration adjustments to improve general system responsiveness. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: Repair Windows 11 SMB Issue
Entries.Description: Repair common Windows 11 SMB client/share issue
Entries.Detail: Fixes a known issue in some Windows 11 builds where SMB share access fails after an update due to a missing registry value.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Fixes a known issue in some Windows 11 builds where SMB share access fails after an update due to a missing registry value.

Entries.Name: SMB Guest Compatibility
Entries.Detail: Allows SMB connections to network shares without requiring authentication. Needed for accessing older NAS devices, printers, or routers.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Allows SMB connections to network shares without requiring authentication. Needed for accessing older NAS devices, printers, or routers. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: SMB Sharing Compatibility
Entries.Description: Preserve SMB file/printer sharing and credentials
Entries.Detail: Preserves your existing SMB share configuration and saved network credentials when other network tweaks are applied.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Preserves your existing SMB share configuration and saved network credentials when other network tweaks are applied. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: Adobe Network Block
Entries.Detail: Adds firewall rules to block Adobe applications from accessing the internet. This affects license validation, cloud sync, and Creative Cloud features.
Entries.CautionReason: Blocking Adobe network access may prevent license validation, disable Creative Cloud syncing, break cloud-based features, trigger subscription errors, and may violate Adobe license terms.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Adobe network access is not blocked
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Adds firewall rules to block Adobe applications from accessing the internet. This affects license validation, cloud sync, and Creative Cloud features. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.

Entries.Name: Brave Debloat
Entries.Description: Disable Brave rewards, wallet, VPN, AI chat
Entries.Detail: Disables Brave browser's optional extras: rewards, crypto wallet, VPN, and AI chat. Only affects these Brave-specific features, not your browsing.
Entries.CautionReason: Disables Brave rewards, wallet, VPN, and AI chat features permanently. Only use if you want to remove those features completely.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Brave extras (rewards, wallet, VPN, AI) are enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Disables Brave browser's optional extras: rewards, crypto wallet, VPN, and AI chat. Only affects these Brave-specific features, not your browsing. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.

Entries.Name: Cross-Device Resume
Entries.Detail: Lets you resume tasks from other Windows devices on this PC via a notification pop-up. Disable if you do not use this cross-device feature.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Lets you resume tasks from other Windows devices on this PC via a notification pop-up. Disable if you do not use this cross-device feature.

Entries.Name: Disk Cleanup
Entries.Detail: Runs the built-in Windows Disk Cleanup tool to remove temporary files, system cache, and other unneeded data to free up disk space.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Runs the built-in Windows Disk Cleanup tool to remove temporary files, system cache, and other unneeded data to free up disk space. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: Explorer Automatic Folder Discovery
Entries.Detail: File Explorer detects the content type of each folder and applies a matching view template. Disabling locks all folders to a consistent generic view.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Explorer automatic folder type discovery is disabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: File Explorer detects the content type of each folder and applies a matching view template. Disabling locks all folders to a consistent generic view.

Entries.Name: Modern Standby Fix
Entries.Detail: Modern Standby (S0) can cause high CPU and power usage while the PC appears to be sleeping. This fix switches to S3-style deep sleep behavior.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Modern Standby (S0) can cause high CPU and power usage while the PC appears to be sleeping. This fix switches to S3-style deep sleep behavior.

Entries.Name: Razer Software Block
Entries.Detail: Blocks Razer Synapse installer scripts from running automatically. Prevents unwanted Razer software from being installed in the background.
Entries.CautionReason: May prevent Razer Synapse from installing/updating, disable RGB/macro/device profile functionality, stop firmware updates, and cause limited peripheral features.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Razer software installs are not blocked
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Blocks Razer Synapse installer scripts from running automatically. Prevents unwanted Razer software from being installed in the background. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.

Entries.Name: S3 Sleep
Entries.Detail: S3 is traditional deep sleep where the PC fully powers down components. Some systems default to Modern Standby which can drain power while idle.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: S3 is traditional deep sleep where the PC fully powers down components. Some systems default to Modern Standby which can drain power while idle.

Entries.Name: Services Manual Startup
Entries.Description: Apply recommended startup types to Windows services
Entries.Detail: Sets a selection of non-essential Windows services from Automatic to Manual startup. Services will still start on demand when needed.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Windows services use their original startup types
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Sets a selection of non-essential Windows services from Automatic to Manual startup. Services will still start on demand when needed. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: Teredo
Entries.Detail: Teredo is a tunneling protocol that provides IPv6 connectivity over IPv4 networks. Required for Xbox Live connectivity and some peer-to-peer applications.
Entries.CautionReason: Teredo is an IPv6 tunneling protocol needed for NAT traversal. Disabling it may break Xbox Live and certain peer-to-peer applications.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Teredo is a tunneling protocol that provides IPv6 connectivity over IPv4 networks. Required for Xbox Live connectivity and some peer-to-peer applications. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.

Entries.Name: Windows Platform Binary Table (WPBT)
Entries.Detail: WPBT is a firmware table that lets manufacturers run software during Windows startup. Disabling prevents manufacturer-injected executables from running automatically.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Windows Platform Binary Table (WPBT) is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: WPBT is a firmware table that lets manufacturers run software during Windows startup. Disabling prevents manufacturer-injected executables from running automatically. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
